message:
perf(vdbe,core): share table_index_meta via Arc and move ResultRow values instead of cloning

Three related hot-path optimizations:

1. VdbeProgram now stores table_index_meta behind Arc<TableIndexMetaMap>
   (HashMap with Box<[IndexCursorMeta]> values). The engine swaps in
   the program's Arc on execute() instead of cloning the entire map
   per-statement, eliminating allocation on every REPLACE-capable
   program run.

2. ProgramBuilder accumulates index metadata via HashMap entry API
   instead of a Vec of tuples, properly merging multiple
   register_table_indexes calls for the same table cursor.

3. ResultRow now uses take_reg_range() to move values out of the
   register file (leaving Null behind) instead of deep-cloning Text
   and Blob values on every row emission — the registers are about
   to be overwritten on the next iteration anyway.

4. Connection::table_execution_runtime_inputs simplified from
   Result<T> to T — the function never actually fails, removing
   unnecessary error propagation on every statement execution.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
